notes: Boss Rush v2 — full redesign. Boss is 2× bigger now, with 3 shield rings × 6 angular segments (18 walls total). Only one segment per ring is vulnerable at a time, glows brightly with the beat and shows a WEAK indicator — bullets through non-active segments pass through. Shoot the active segment to crack it open, next one activates clockwise. After all 6 segments of a ring shed, next ring activates. All 3 rings shed → naked core exposed for the kill. HARD COLLISION: touching boss pushes you out + deals damage (no more flying into center). MINIONS: spawn after first ring breaks, orbit boss + shoot at you. BIG CHARGED ATTACK: boss telegraphs a giant arena-clearing shockwave every ~14s outside DROP — dash to survive. DROP phase still exists and grants 1.6× damage bonus. Camera zooms out for boss fights. FIXED: boss music no longer overridden by carousel selection — always pulls from boss-track pool.
